title: Cashflow management and dashboards

posts.author: PaladaARCH (Stjepan Palada)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I am looking to build a board and dashboard for cashflow management in our company.

What I would like to achieve is to have a board where I input my income and expenses, their date when paid, and their deadline. It will look a bit like this:

Screenshot_101236×335 29.2 KB

What I would like to achieve is to have a way where I have an actual and “upcoming” or “expected” chart. I’d like the chart to show a line which shows the actual inflows and outflows, and then becomes a different formatted line where it goes to “expected” inflows and outflows.

I hope I was clear on what I would like to achieve. I also believe a lot of other people could use this.
